tagline: Post Google Calendar event reminders to Discord channels automatically
metaTitle: Google Calendar + Discord Integration - Event Reminders in Discord | GAIA
metaDescription: Connect Google Calendar and Discord with GAIA. Automatically post event reminders and schedule announcements to Discord channels, and create calendar events from Discord community discussions.
intro:
Discord communities, gaming groups, and remote teams rely on Discord as their primary communication platform, but event reminders and schedule announcements still require someone to manually post in the right channel at the right time. Google Calendar holds the events, but Discord is where the audience is. Without a bridge, event organizers spend time crafting manual announcements and followers miss events they would have attended.

GAIA connects Google Calendar and Discord so that event reminders are posted to the right Discord channels automatically. When an event on your calendar is approaching, GAIA posts a formatted reminder to your designated Discord channel with the event name, time, and any relevant details. When community members discuss an event in Discord, GAIA can create the corresponding Google Calendar entry and share the invite link back to the channel.

This integration is ideal for Discord community managers who run regular events and want automated reminders, for game development teams using Discord as their primary coordination tool, and for any remote team that has adopted Discord for voice and text communication and wants their meeting schedule surfaced where their team already spends time.

useCases.title: Automated event reminders to Discord channels
useCases.description: GAIA posts formatted event reminders to designated Discord channels before upcoming Google Calendar events, including the event name, start time, agenda, and any join links so community members are always informed.

useCases.title: Create calendar events from Discord discussions
useCases.description: When an event, game night, or team meeting is discussed in Discord, tell GAIA to create the corresponding Google Calendar event and share the invite link back to the channel so participants can add it to their calendars.

useCases.title: Daily schedule digest in Discord
useCases.description: GAIA posts a morning schedule summary to a designated Discord channel listing the day's events so your community or team knows what's happening without anyone needing to check a calendar.

useCases.title: Event cancellation and rescheduling announcements
useCases.description: When a Google Calendar event is cancelled or rescheduled, GAIA automatically posts an update to the relevant Discord channel so attendees are informed immediately without a manual announcement.

useCases.title: Community event RSVP tracking
useCases.description: GAIA posts event announcements to Discord with RSVP reaction buttons. Reactions are tracked and summarized back in Google Calendar as expected attendance, giving organizers headcount visibility without a separate RSVP tool.

howItWorks.step: Connect Google Calendar and Discord to GAIA
howItWorks.description: Authorize Google Calendar in GAIA's integration settings and invite the GAIA bot to your Discord server. You select which Google Calendars to monitor and which Discord channels receive event notifications.

howItWorks.step: Configure reminder timing and notification format
howItWorks.description: Set how far in advance GAIA posts reminders — for example, 24 hours and 1 hour before — and customize the message format including which event details to include and how mentions should be used.

howItWorks.step: GAIA posts reminders and manages announcements automatically
howItWorks.description: GAIA monitors your Google Calendars and posts reminders to Discord on schedule. It also handles updates and cancellations automatically so your Discord community always has current event information.

faqs.question: Can GAIA post reminders to multiple Discord channels for different calendars?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can map different Google Calendars to different Discord channels. For example, your community events calendar might post to a public announcements channel while a team calendar posts to a private staff channel.

faqs.question: Can GAIA mention specific Discord roles when posting event reminders?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can configure GAIA to mention specific Discord roles in event reminder posts — for example, mentioning the @everyone or @team role for different event types — to ensure the right people are notified.

faqs.question: Does GAIA support Discord's native Events feature in addition to channel posts?
faqs.answer: Yes. GAIA can create Discord scheduled events from Google Calendar entries in addition to posting text reminders, giving your community a native Discord event to express interest in and receive Discord's own reminder notifications.
